label: Low-record-burden interpretation-limited
meaning: The gene was enumerated, but ClinVar P/LP record count is too sparse for robust architecture interpretation.
not_meaning: This is not a negative result and not an impossibility call.

label: Compact downstream-CDS opportunity
meaning: A downstream-CDS transcript-unit hypothesis captures high record coverage with nominally compact donor burden.
not_meaning: This is not a functional rescue claim; splice, isoform, dosage, NMD, and protein rescue are not modeled.

label: High-coverage context-burden opportunity
meaning: Theoretical coverage can be high, but interpretation depends on donor size, splice context, dosage, or transcript assumptions.
not_meaning: High record coverage is not patient coverage or therapeutic suitability.

label: Compact exon/block opportunity
meaning: An adjacent exon/block unit captures a meaningful fraction of record burden.
not_meaning: This is not a final molecular design or mode recommendation.

label: Donor-burden stress
meaning: High theoretical coverage may require large donor span or complex transcript context.
not_meaning: This is not impossible; it means donor and evidence burden dominate interpretation.

label: Tumor-predisposition control/caution
meaning: A high-burden tumor-predisposition gene retained as control/caution rather than replacement suitability.
not_meaning: This is not a therapeutic replacement claim.

label: Single-exon hotspot opportunity
meaning: A single exon captures a high fraction of mapped P/LP records.
not_meaning: This is not a final target nomination.

label: Diffuse/moderate opportunity
meaning: No compact high-coverage architecture dominates in the current all-mapped interpretation.
not_meaning: This does not exclude future curated interpretation.

label: Mechanism-complex limitation
meaning: Repeat, noncoding, splice-dominant, or mechanism-complex biology limits VCF-based record interpretation.
not_meaning: This is not a final designability decision.

label: Mapping/locus-complex caution
meaning: Transcript or locus complexity requires caution before interpreting replacement opportunity.
not_meaning: This is not a negative result.
